meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master Version Control: Antigravity Template for Students
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Learn to use the Antigravity project template to solve version control issues and build professional-grade AI applications today.
content.answer_block: Version control is the backbone of professional software engineering. By implementing the Antigravity project template, you establish an immutable audit trail for your codebase. This automated approach ensures that every logic iteration is tracked, recoverable, and ready for production deployment, effectively eliminating the risks associated with manual file management.
content.intro:
You are staring at a folder of 'final_v2_fixed.py' files, paralyzed by the fear that your next line of code might irreversibly break your only working prototype. This is the silent killer of student projects—the lack of a robust version control system. It turns a creative coding session into a high-stakes gamble where progress is often erased by a single typo.

But what if you could bypass the overhead of complex Git branching strategies while maintaining enterprise-grade reliability? The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural safety net, abstracting the complexity of state management so you can focus on building intelligence. It is time to graduate from 'hope-based coding' to a professional engineering workflow.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root directory structure that enforces atomic commits and state snapshotting automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project environment using the Antigravity template, ensuring the .antigravity configuration file is pre-configured for automated version snapshots.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Context
steps.description: Link your codebase to Claude Code so it understands your project's architectural constraints and version history.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the current directory as a Claude Code workspace, specifically pointing to the antigravity-state directory for context awareness.

steps.title: Implement Atomic Feature Branches
steps.description: Use the template's branching logic to isolate new AI features without risking the stability of your core application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an isolated feature branch named 'feature/nlp-integration' using the Antigravity workflow, ensuring state isolation from the main branch.

steps.title: Automated State Snapshotting
steps.description: Trigger a state capture before major logic refactors to ensure you can revert to a working version instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a pre-refactor state snapshot with a detailed manifest of all current file changes and dependency states.
steps.claude_code_command: antigravity snapshot --message 'Pre-refactor state for NLP logic'

steps.title: Verify and Merge Workflow
steps.description: Validate the integrity of your code changes against the template's regression tests before finalizing the merge.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the Antigravity validation suite to verify the feature branch state and merge it into the main production branch.

pro_tips: Always run an antigravity snapshot immediately after installing new dependencies to avoid environment drift.
Use Claude Code to audit your commit history weekly; ask it to identify patterns where your code tends to break.
Keep your main branch strictly for production-ready code; use the Antigravity template's ephemeral branches for all experimental AI prompting.
Enable 'Auto-Snapshot' in your .antigravity settings to capture local states every 30 minutes of active coding.
When encountering a bug, use 'antigravity diff --last-working' to see exactly which logic change introduced the regression.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is stable using the Antigravity template, begin deploying your code to a cloud environment using CI/CD pipelines to automate the testing process you just mastered.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the architecture used by top-tier engineers to ship secure, scalable AI applications. Stop worrying about lost code and start focusing on the impact of your product. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
